Title: Commercial Construction Services
Content:
At Spicola Construction, we bring precision, professionalism, and over a decade of general contracting experience to every commercial construction project in Tampa and the surrounding areas. Whether you’re building from the ground up, executing an office build-out, or remodeling a high-traffic retail center, we provide end-to-end services tailored to the unique regulatory and operational demands of your business. Our team is known for delivering high-quality, code-compliant commercial spaces that are delivered on time and within budget.

Why Tampa Properties Need Professional Commercial Construction Services

Tampa commercial buildings face strict wind load engineering requirements (often designed for 140+ MPH gusts depending on proximity to the bay) and rigorous ADA compliance codes. Navigating local permitting with the City of Tampa or Hillsborough County requires experienced CGC general contractors who understand commercial zoning, strict fire-safety guidelines, and local environmental standards.

Common Concerns & Warning Signs

  • Outgrown operational spaces requiring structural expansions or layout re-configurations.
  • Non-compliant commercial spaces facing ADA accessibility infractions or safety citations.
  • Wear and tear on high-traffic retail, office, or restaurant properties requiring structural updates.
  • Outdated building envelopes leading to thermal inefficiency and sky-high utility bills.

Our Commercial Construction Services Solutions in Tampa Bay

We engineer commercial spaces to support business growth and ensure long-term structural durability. Our commercial solutions include:

  • Ground-Up Construction: Complete new construction management from structural steel to final occupancy permits.
  • Office & Retail Remodeling: Modernizing aging footprints to improve workflow, energy efficiency, and brand representation.
  • Medical & Professional Office Build-Outs: High-performance interior fit-outs engineered to meet specialized health and safety regulations.

How Commercial Construction Services Protects & Enhances Your Property

We manage commercial safety risk through thorough structural inspections and zero-compromise building practices. If your commercial property has suffered sudden damage or code violations, we work alongside our sister company **RestoWrx** for immediate site stabilization, debris extraction, and structural dryout. We also integrate with **Hot Water Heroes Plumbing** to deploy heavy-duty commercial plumbing systems, high-capacity grease traps, and commercial-grade backflow preventers.

Commercial Construction Services Cost Expectations in Tampa

Commercial construction costs in Tampa vary significantly based on scale, occupancy classification, and finish levels. Ground-up commercial builds typically range from $150 to $350+ per square foot. Commercial interior build-outs and tenant improvements generally average between $50 and $150 per square foot. We provide transparent, fully line-itemed estimates with clear progress milestones so you can manage your commercial capital expenditure with absolute confidence.

Our Systematic Construction Process

  1. Phase 1: Pre-Construction & Estimating: We coordinate architectural reviews, engineering requirements, and submit highly detailed, transparent commercial quotes.
  2. Phase 2: Permitting & Code Coordination: Our team manages municipal approvals, safety reviews, and local environmental compliance checks.
  3. Phase 3: Execution & Site Safety: We implement clean, highly organized, and OSHA-compliant job sites, managing subcontractors and materials strictly on schedule.
  4. Phase 4: Inspection & Final Handover: We conduct rigorous code-compliance walkthroughs, pass commercial inspections, and deliver a turn-key space ready for occupancy.

Schedule Your Free Commercial Construction Services Consultation

Need a commercial contractor that values your bottom line and respects your schedule? Spicola Construction delivers commercial construction services across Hillsborough, Pinellas, and Pasco counties. Contact our professional commercial estimating team today at **(813) 732-6285** to discuss your commercial development goals.

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Do you handle the permitting process for Tampa commercial projects?
A: Yes. As a licensed Certified General Contractor, Spicola Construction manages the entire commercial permitting workflow through the City of Tampa, Hillsborough County, or Pinellas County, ensuring code compliance and architectural approval.

Q: Can you perform commercial renovations after business hours?
A: Absolutely. We understand that business continuity is critical. We coordinate phased construction schedules and off-hours labor to minimize noise, disruption, and footprint impact on your active business operations.

Q: What commercial certifications do you hold?
A: We are fully licensed Certified General Contractors (CGC) in the state of Florida, carrying comprehensive commercial liability insurance, umbrella policies, and workers' compensation coverage protecting all parties on-site.

Title: Residential Construction Services

Common Concerns & Warning Signs

Our Residential Construction Services Solutions in Tampa Bay

A: Yes. Spicola Construction provides comprehensive design-build services on your vacant lot. We handle site clearing, utility connections, foundation engineering, and the full home build from the ground up.

A: A whole-home renovation usually takes between 3 to 6 months depending on the scale, structural layout changes, and permitting timelines. We provide a detailed weekly schedule to keep you fully informed.

Title: Hospitality Construction Services

Title: Kitchen Remodeling
Content:
The kitchen is the undisputed heart of your home. It’s where family recipes are shared, morning coffees are enjoyed, and guests gather during parties. At Spicola Construction, we specialize in high-end kitchen remodeling in Tampa that seamlessly blends chef-grade functionality with stunning custom design. Whether you want to knock down walls to create a modern open-concept space, install custom cabinetry, or design an expansive island, we manage every phase of your project to deliver the kitchen of your dreams.

Why Tampa Properties Need Professional Kitchen Remodeling

Florida kitchens face constant high humidity, making durable, solid wood cabinet boxes and moisture-resistant backing materials a necessity. In Tampa's coastal areas, selecting rust-resistant hardware and high-performance ventilation is critical to protect your investment from salt-air degradation and cooking heat.

Common Concerns & Warning Signs

  • Cramped, closed-off layouts that separate the cook from the rest of the family.
  • Insufficient storage space leading to cluttered countertops and disorganized pantries.
  • Worn, peeling cabinet laminate, cracked tiles, or outdated countertops that are difficult to clean.
  • Outdated plumbing and electrical wiring that cannot support modern high-draw kitchen appliances.

Our Kitchen Remodeling Solutions in Tampa Bay

We transform dated kitchens into functional, luxury spaces designed for your lifestyle. Our kitchen remodeling solutions include:

  • Layout Re-Configurations: Knocking down load-bearing walls to connect your kitchen to the dining and living areas.
  • Custom Cabinetry & Storage: Designing bespoke solid wood cabinetry, built-in pantries, and deep pull-out organizers.
  • Premium Finishes: Installing granite, quartz, or marble countertops, custom tile backsplashes, and modern under-cabinet lighting.

How Kitchen Remodeling Protects & Enhances Your Property

Water leaks behind kitchen cabinets or under the sink can cause catastrophic mold growth in Tampa's humid climate. During demolition, if we discover hidden plumbing leaks or drywall rot, our sister company **RestoWrx** is immediately brought in to remediate mold and dry the framing. We also coordinate with **Hot Water Heroes Plumbing** to ensure custom pot fillers, ice maker lines, double sink drains, and high-efficiency gas lines are roughed-in perfectly.

Kitchen Remodeling Cost Expectations in Tampa

Kitchen remodeling in Tampa varies depending on size, materials, and layout changes. A standard kitchen refresh typically ranges from $20,000 to $35,000. A full-scale custom kitchen remodel with layout re-configurations, premium quartz, and custom cabinetry generally ranges from $40,000 to $85,000+. We provide complete upfront transparency, specifying all custom selections in writing.

Our Systematic Construction Process

  1. Step 1: Design & Material Selection: We plan your layout, design cabinet configurations, and help you select quartz, tile, and finishes.
  2. Step 2: Permits & Logistics: We secure all residential building, plumbing, and electrical permits required by your municipality.
  3. Step 3: Demolition & Reconstruction: We strip the old kitchen, inspect framing, move utilities, hang drywall, and apply perfect base painting.
  4. Step 4: Finishes & Final Inspection: We install cabinetry, templated quartz, tile, fixtures, and appliances, passing final municipal inspections.

Schedule Your Free Kitchen Remodeling Consultation

Ready to design a stunning kitchen that makes cooking a joy? Spicola Construction remodels kitchens across Hillsborough, Pinellas, and Pasco counties. Call our custom design team today at **(813) 732-6285** for a free in-home consultation.

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Can you knock down a wall to create an open-concept kitchen?
A: Yes. As a licensed general contractor, we specialize in structural modifications. We evaluate if the wall is load-bearing, install temporary shoring, and engineer a permanent structural header beam to safely open your space.

Q: How long does a kitchen remodel take?
A: A standard kitchen remodel typically takes 3 to 5 weeks from demolition to final walkthrough. Layout changes or custom cabinetry orders can extend the timeline slightly, which we schedule transparently in advance.

Q: Can I keep my existing appliances during the remodel?
A: Absolutely. We can design your new cabinet layouts around your existing appliances, or we can accommodate new chef-grade appliances by modifying cabinet specs and rough-in locations.

Title: Bathroom Remodeling
Content:
A dated, cramped, or poorly ventilated bathroom is more than just an eyesore—it can be a ticking water-damage time bomb. When you’re dealing with cracked grout, musty odors, or an inefficient layout, professional bathroom remodeling is an investment in your home's equity and daily comfort. Spicola Construction is Tampa Bay’s premier Certified General Contractor, delivering custom bathroom design and flawless execution that stands the test of time.

Why Tampa Properties Need Professional Bathroom Remodeling

Tampa's high humidity and subtropical climate make bathrooms highly susceptible to hidden mold, drywall rot, and structural decay. Steam from showers frequently gets trapped behind walls due to inadequate ventilation, leading to structural failures. Furthermore, Tampa's municipal water carries high mineral concentrations that corrode older copper and galvanized piping behind shower walls.

Common Concerns & Warning Signs

  • Failed Shower Pans: Slow leaks beneath tile that rot subflooring and framing.
  • Inadequate Ventilation: High humidity causing peeling drywall paint, moldy ceilings, and mildew.
  • Hard Water Damage: Mineral deposits seizing up internal mixing valves and ruining luxury fixtures.
  • Outdated Layouts: Cramped spaces lacking storage or modern walk-in accessibility.

Our Bathroom Remodeling Solutions in Tampa Bay

We specialize in a wide range of bathroom configurations tailored to your space and budget:

  • Master Suite Oases: Luxury transformations featuring freestanding tubs, double vanities, custom glass enclosures, and high-end finishes.
  • Guest & Hall Bathroom Updates: Efficient, stylish remodels designed to maximize space and durability for busy families.
  • Curbless & Walk-In Showers: Age-in-place zero-entry transitions featuring seamless Schluter-KERDI waterproofing systems.
  • Commercial Restroom Renovations: Code-compliant, ADA-accessible restroom builds for office spaces, retail centers, and medical facilities.

How Bathroom Remodeling Protects & Enhances Your Property

Poorly executed bathroom tiling and cheap shower liners are leading causes of household water damage. A single pinhole leak in a shower pan can release gallons of water into your subfloor every day. At Spicola Construction, we ensure your wet areas are completely water-tight. If we uncover active water damage or structural rot during demolition, our sister company **RestoWrx** is immediately dispatched to handle water extraction and mold mitigation. We also partner with **Hot Water Heroes Plumbing** to ensure all in-wall rough-ins, pressure-balanced valves, and drainage lines are installed to master-plumber standards.

Bathroom Remodeling Cost Expectations in Tampa

The cost of remodeling a bathroom in Tampa depends on the square footage, structural layout changes, and finish selections. Typical local ranges include a powder room refresh at $8,000 – $15,000, a standard full bathroom renovation at $15,000 – $28,000, and a luxury master bath oasis at $30,000 – $55,000+. These estimates include all construction permits, professional layout design, premium waterproofing, licensed trade labor, and a dedicated project manager.

Our Systematic Construction Process

  1. Step 1: Design & Material Selection: We review your space, discuss your layout goals, select materials, and provide a firm, upfront quote.
  2. Step 2: Permitting & Procurement: We secure all local Hillsborough/Pinellas county building permits and order your fixtures, tile, and vanities.
  3. Step 3: Clean Demolition: We carefully remove old fixtures, tile, and drywall, maintaining a dust-isolated job site.
  4. Step 4: Structural & Trade Rough-ins: We repair any existing wood rot, frame new walls, and rough-in plumbing and electrical.
  5. Step 5: Schluter-KERDI Waterproofing: We apply a complete, vapor-tight waterproofing membrane to all wet areas to guarantee a leak-free life.
  6. Step 6: Tile, Finishes & Trim: Our expert craftsmen lay tile, mount vanities, install fixtures, and perform final detail work.
  7. Step 7: Inspection & Walkthrough: We pass municipal building inspections and perform a final walk-through with you to ensure perfection.

Schedule Your Free Bathroom Remodeling Consultation

Ready to design a stunning, leak-free bathroom oasis? Spicola Construction remodels bathrooms across Hillsborough, Pinellas, and Pasco counties. Contact our custom bathroom design team today at **(813) 732-6285** to schedule a free in-home consultation.

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Do I need a building permit to remodel my bathroom in Tampa?
A: Yes. Any project that involves moving plumbing fixtures, updating electrical wiring, or altering structural framing requires a building permit from the county or city of Tampa. As your general contractor, Spicola Construction handles all permit submissions and inspections for you.

Q: How long does a standard bathroom remodel take?
A: A standard guest bathroom remodel typically takes 2 to 3 weeks, while a major master suite transformation with layout changes can take 4 to 6 weeks. We provide a detailed schedule before we begin and keep you updated every step of the way.

Q: What is a curbless shower, and can it be installed in my home?
A: A curbless shower features a floor that is flush with the rest of the bathroom, sloping down to a linear drain. It provides a sleek, modern look and excellent ADA accessibility. Most Tampa homes on concrete slabs or wood framing can accommodate a curbless shower, but it requires specialized subfloor recessing and professional waterproofing.

Title: Home Additions & Room Extensions
Content:
When your home begins to feel cramped but you love your neighborhood, school district, and property lot, you don't need to move. At Spicola Construction, we specialize in high-end home additions and room extensions in Tampa that seamlessly expand your living space while matching your home's existing architecture. From master suite extensions and guest wings to expansive sunrooms and second-story additions, we manage the entire structural process to add lasting square footage and value to your home.

Why Tampa Properties Need Professional Home Additions & Room Extensions

Executing structural additions in Tampa Bay requires meticulous soil compaction and foundation engineering due to Florida's sandy soils, which can shift and cause settling cracks. Furthermore, new additions must be perfectly tied into your existing roofline using heavy-duty hurricane straps, complying with strict local wind-resistant construction standards.

Common Concerns & Warning Signs

  • Growing families requiring extra bedrooms, guest suites, or dedicated home offices.
  • Desire for a larger master suite, family room, or expanded kitchen footprint.
  • Underutilized backyard space that could be converted into a high-value home extension.
  • Desire to build an in-law suite (ADU) to accommodate multi-generational living.

Our Home Additions & Room Extensions Solutions in Tampa Bay

We engineer home extensions that blend seamlessly with your home's original lines. Our solutions include:

  • Master Suite Extensions: Creating large, private bedroom and bathroom sanctuaries with walk-in closets.
  • Second-Story Additions: Doubling your home's square footage upward without reducing your backyard footprint.
  • In-Law Suites & ADUs: Detached or attached self-contained living units complete with kitchenettes and bathrooms.

How Home Additions & Room Extensions Protects & Enhances Your Property

Opening up an existing home's roof or walls to tie in an addition presents significant water exposure risks during Florida's sudden downpours. To protect your home, we implement heavy-duty weather tarps and active moisture monitoring. If unexpected rain breaches a joint, our sister company **RestoWrx** provides instant dryout response. We also coordinate with **Hot Water Heroes Plumbing** to expand your home's plumbing systems, ensuring new lines maintain excellent water pressure and drainage capacity.

Home Additions & Room Extensions Cost Expectations in Tampa

Home additions in Tampa generally range from $220 to $380+ per square foot depending on structural complexity and finishes. Standard ground-level room extensions typically start around $45,000, while complex master suite additions or second-story expansions can range from $90,000 to $200,000+. We provide comprehensive, fixed-price contracts with complete architectural and permit specs.

Our Systematic Construction Process

  1. Step 1: Architectural & Engineering Design: We coordinate blueprints, foundation soil engineering, and load-bearing framing calculations.
  2. Step 2: Permits & Foundation Pouring: We secure structural permits, excavate, treat for termites, lay vapor barriers, and pour a code-compliant concrete slab.
  3. Step 3: Framing & Weather-Proofing: We frame block or wood walls, tie the roof truss system into the existing structure with hurricane ties, and secure the envelope.
  4. Step 4: Rough-ins & Finishes: We run electrical, plumbing, and HVAC, hang drywall, install matching siding or stucco, and complete custom interior finishes.

Schedule Your Free Home Additions & Room Extensions Consultation

Need more room to grow without the hassle of moving? Spicola Construction builds premium home additions across Hillsborough, Pinellas, and Pasco counties. Contact our structural general contractors at **(813) 732-6285** to schedule a professional site consultation.

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How do you tie a new room addition's roof into my existing roof?
A: We carefully strip back the shingles and decking on your existing roof at the tie-in point. Our structural team then interlocks the new roof trusses with your existing framing, applies heavy water-proofing ice-and-water shields, and installs matching roofing materials for a seamless look and leak-free performance.

Q: What is the permitting timeline for a home addition in Tampa?
A: Structural permits for residential additions generally take 4 to 8 weeks to clear local county or City of Tampa building departments, as they require thorough review of architectural blueprints and environmental zoning setbacks.

Q: Can I live in my home while the addition is being built?
A: Yes. In most cases, we isolate the active construction zone using heavy dust-containment walls. The tie-in window (when we break through the existing home's wall) is typically scheduled at the very end of structural framing to minimize impact on your daily life.

Title: Roofing Services
Content:
Your roof is your home’s primary defense against Florida’s intense weather. At Spicola Construction, we provide comprehensive roofing services in Tampa designed to protect your property from blistering sun, torrential rain, and hurricane-force winds. As a fully licensed general contractor, we deliver expert roof inspections, leak repairs, structural roof deck reinforcements, and complete roof replacements utilizing premium, wind-rated materials.

Why Tampa Properties Need Professional Roofing Services

Tampa roofs operate in one of the most punishing climates in North America. Intense UV rays dry out shingle asphalt, causing premature granule loss and cracking. Furthermore, high humidity and coastal salt air accelerate rust on metal flashing, while tropical wind gusts require precise, code-compliant nail patterns to prevent shingle uplift.

Common Concerns & Warning Signs

  • Water stains on ceilings, damp insulation, or active attic leaks after heavy storms.
  • Curled, cracked, or missing shingles indicating severe UV degradation.
  • Excessive granules clogging your gutters, showing your shingle protective layer has failed.
  • Algae streaks or moss growth holding moisture against your shingles and rotting the wood deck.

Our Roofing Services Solutions in Tampa Bay

We provide complete residential and commercial roofing solutions engineered for maximum durability. Our services include:

  • Roof Inspections & Maintenance: Spotting micro-cracks, damaged flashing, and wind uplift issues before leaks develop.
  • Premium Shingle Roofing: Installing high-performance architectural shingles with 130-MPH wind-resistance ratings.
  • Durable Metal Roofing: Installing premium standing-seam metal roofs that offer ultimate storm protection and energy efficiency.

How Roofing Services Protects & Enhances Your Property

A compromised roof can lead to catastrophic water damage and toxic mold within days. If your roof has suffered wind damage or is actively leaking, we coordinate with our sister company **RestoWrx** for immediate emergency tarping, water extraction, and drywall dryout. We also ensure that any plumbing stack vents, flashing around pipes, and roof drains are perfectly sealed and integrated, partnering with **Hot Water Heroes Plumbing** to replace old, corroded vent flashing.

Roofing Services Cost Expectations in Tampa

Minor roof repairs in Tampa typically range from $350 to $1,200 depending on flashing and leak complexity. Full-scale roofing services and replacements are detailed under our specialized Roof Replacement options, offering clear, up-front quotes with no hidden disposal fees.

Our Systematic Construction Process

  1. Step 1: Visual & Structural Inspection: We perform a comprehensive attic and rooftop inspection to evaluate shingles, deck integrity, and flashing.
  2. Step 2: Detailed Condition Report: We present a clear estimate detailing any leak locations, structural rot, or wind damage with digital photos.
  3. Step 3: Professional Repair & Sealing: We replace compromised decking, install premium ice-and-water shields, and secure new wind-rated materials.
  4. Step 4: Quality & Cleanup Inspection: We run a magnetic sweep of your property to collect all nails, verify a seamless seal, and pass code inspections.

Schedule Your Free Roofing Services Consultation

Suspect your roof has wind damage or is nearing the end of its life? Spicola Construction provides elite roofing services across Hillsborough, Pinellas, and Pasco counties. Contact our roofing estimators today at **(813) 732-6285** to schedule a free inspection.

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How often should I have my Tampa roof inspected?
A: We recommend having your roof professionally inspected at least once a year, preferably before the start of the Atlantic hurricane season (June 1st), and immediately following any major tropical storm or wind event.

Q: Does my homeowner's insurance cover roof repair?
A: If your roof has suffered sudden storm or wind damage, your homeowner's policy typically covers the repairs or replacement. We provide detailed photographic documentation and detailed line-item quotes to support your claim process.

Q: Can you repair a roof leak without replacing the entire roof?
A: Yes. If the surrounding shingles and roof decking are in stable condition, we can perform localized repairs to replace damaged flashing, valley underlayment, or target missing shingles to fully resolve the leak.

Title: Roof Replacement
Content:
When your roof has reached the end of its functional life or has sustained severe storm damage, localized repairs are no longer enough. At Spicola Construction, we specialize in premium roof replacement in Tampa, engineered to withstand the most extreme Florida weather. As a licensed general contractor, we don't just put a new layer of shingles on—we strip your roof down to the wood deck, replace rotted plywood, reinforce structural framing, and install a state-of-the-art, fully warrantied roofing system.

Why Tampa Properties Need Professional Roof Replacement

Tampa Bay sits in a designated High Velocity Hurricane Zone. When replacing a roof, strict local building codes require us to re-nail the existing plywood decking to your trusses using ring-shank nails at a tight 6-inch spacing. This structural reinforcement significantly reduces the risk of roof deck blow-off during a hurricane and qualifies you for valuable wind mitigation insurance discounts.

Common Concerns & Warning Signs

  • Your asphalt shingle roof is more than 15–20 years old and showing extensive wear.
  • Active, widespread leaks across multiple rooms indicating underlayment failure.
  • Bald, curling shingles with extensive granule loss and exposed fiberglass underlayment.
  • Your roof has been severely damaged by hurricane winds or fallen trees.

Our Roof Replacement Solutions in Tampa Bay

We replace roofs using a zero-shortcut approach, utilizing premium shingles and metals designed for Florida's climate. Our replacement solutions include:

  • Architectural Shingle Replacement: Installing thick, multi-dimensional shingles rated for 130-MPH winds with algae-resistant technology.
  • Standing-Seam Metal Replacement: Installing ultimate-durability metal panels that reflect heat and offer a 50+ year lifespan.
  • Flat Roof Systems: Deploying high-performance TPO or modified bitumen systems for residential low-slope porches and commercial properties.

How Roof Replacement Protects & Enhances Your Property

Replacing a roof exposes your home's interior to the elements during the tear-off phase. We strictly monitor weather patterns and tear off your roof in controlled sections, sealing the deck with premium synthetic underlayment immediately. If a sudden storm breaks through during construction, our sister company **RestoWrx** is on standby with industrial fans and dehumidifiers. We also partner with **Hot Water Heroes Plumbing** to ensure all plumbing stack vents are perfectly integrated with new, heavy-duty lead boots.

Roof Replacement Cost Expectations in Tampa

The cost of replacing a roof in Tampa depends on square footage, pitch, and materials. A standard architectural shingle roof replacement typically ranges from $8,500 to $16,000. Premium standing-seam metal roofs generally range from $16,000 to $32,000+. We provide comprehensive, flat-rate quotes that include tear-off, rotted deck replacement, permits, and a lifetime workmanship warranty.

Our Systematic Construction Process

  1. Step 1: Total Tear-off: We strip the old roofing down to the bare plywood, disposing of all debris responsibly.
  2. Step 2: Deck Inspection & Re-Nailing: We replace any rotted or water-damaged plywood and re-nail the entire roof deck to meet hurricane wind-mitigation codes.
  3. Step 3: Waterproofing Membrane: We apply a self-adhering ice-and-water shield in all valleys and a premium synthetic underlayment across the entire deck.
  4. Step 4: Premium Roof Installation: We install your choice of architectural shingles or metal panels, new drip edge flashing, lead boots, and ridge vents.

Schedule Your Free Roof Replacement Consultation

Ready to protect your home with a beautiful, storm-resistant new roof? Spicola Construction replaces roofs throughout Hillsborough, Pinellas, and Pasco counties. Call our roofing experts at **(813) 732-6285** to schedule a free, up-front estimate.

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is a wind mitigation inspection, and how does a new roof help?
A: A wind mitigation inspection documents your roof's storm-resistant features (such as ring-shank nails, synthetic underlayment, and hurricane straps). Replacing your roof to modern codes automatically qualifies you for a wind mitigation certificate, which can save you up to 30% to 50% on your Florida homeowner's insurance premiums.

Q: How long does a roof replacement take to complete?
A: Most residential roof replacements take only 1 to 2 days of active construction. Larger or highly complex roofs may take 3 days. We schedule our crews tightly to minimize disruption to your home.

Q: Do you provide a warranty on your new roofs?
A: Yes. We provide a lifetime manufacturer's material warranty through leading brands like GAF and Owens Corning, backed by our own 10-year structural workmanship warranty.

Title: Concrete & Flatwork Services
Content:
Solid concrete is the foundation of any long-lasting structure. At Spicola Construction, we specialize in high-quality concrete and flatwork services in Tampa for residential and commercial applications. From structural foundations, monolithic slabs, and commercial parking lots to custom driveways, sidewalks, and pool decks, our team delivers precise excavation, sturdy framing, reinforced rebar structures, and a flawless finish every time.

Why Tampa Properties Need Professional Concrete & Flatwork Services

Tampa's sandy soils are prone to washouts and shifting during heavy Florida rains, making thorough soil compaction, proper grading, and moisture-resistant gravel bases essential. Without these prep steps, concrete will quickly settle, crack, and lift. We also add precise expansion joints to handle extreme thermal expansion under the hot Florida sun.

Common Concerns & Warning Signs

  • Cracked, uneven driveways or sidewalks presenting serious tripping hazards.
  • Sunken concrete slabs indicating soil erosion or poor initial sub-grade compaction.
  • Ponding water on flatwork due to improper slope, grading, or drainage engineering.
  • Cracking or crumbling concrete near building walls showing structural settlement.

Our Concrete & Flatwork Services Solutions in Tampa Bay

We engineer concrete flatwork to handle high loads and resist soil movement. Our solutions include:

  • Structural Slabs & Foundations: Engineering and pouring monolithic slabs for home additions, custom homes, and commercial buildings.
  • Custom Driveways & Patios: Pouring durable, high-load concrete driveways, stamped decorative patios, and pool surrounds.
  • Sidewalks & Commercial Flatwork: Code-compliant, ADA-accessible commercial walkways, curb installations, and parking lot pads.

How Concrete & Flatwork Services Protects & Enhances Your Property

Eroding soil beneath concrete can cause sudden collapses and damage nearby underground utilities. Before pouring, we perform comprehensive site prep and coordinate utility checks. If a sinkhole or severe soil washout threatens your slab, we work with our sister company **RestoWrx** to stabilize the soil and mitigate water flow. We also partner with **Hot Water Heroes Plumbing** to ensure any under-slab sewer lines, main water pipes, and sleeves are perfectly routed and protected before the concrete is poured.

Concrete & Flatwork Services Cost Expectations in Tampa

Concrete flatwork costs in Tampa typically range from $8 to $15+ per square foot depending on site preparation, excavation, thickness, and reinforcement specifications. Large monolithic slabs for foundations generally range from $10 to $18 per square foot. We provide flat-rate, upfront pricing proposals that include all excavation, grading, rebar, concrete, and finishing labor.

Our Systematic Construction Process

  1. Step 1: Excavation & Grading: We excavate the site, install gravel/sand bases, compact the soil to precise densities, and install heavy vapor barriers.
  2. Step 2: Heavy Framing & Rebar: We construct sturdy wood forms and lay custom steel rebar or wire mesh grids to reinforce structural strength.
  3. Step 3: Precision Pouring & Leveling: We pour premium, high-strength concrete mixes, screeding, leveling, and floating the surface to a perfect slope for drainage.
  4. Step 4: Custom Finishing & Curing: We apply broom, stamped, or smooth finishes, cut precise expansion joints, and apply advanced curing sealants.

Schedule Your Free Concrete & Flatwork Services Consultation

Need a reliable concrete slab or a beautiful new driveway built to last? Spicola Construction pours premium concrete across Hillsborough, Pinellas, and Pasco counties. Contact our flatwork estimators at **(813) 732-6285** to schedule a free project consultation.

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What strength concrete mix do you use for Tampa driveways?
A: We use a premium 3,000 to 4,000 PSI concrete mix reinforced with heavy-duty structural steel rebar or fiberglass mesh to ensure your driveway can support high vehicle weights without cracking.

Q: How long do I need to wait before driving on my new concrete driveway?
A: While you can typically walk on new concrete within 24 to 48 hours, we recommend waiting at least 7 to 10 days before parking or driving heavy passenger vehicles on the slab to allow it to reach its structural curing strength.

Q: Why is my old concrete driveway cracking and lifting?
A: Cracking and lifting are usually caused by tree root intrusion, soil erosion from poor drainage, or a lack of proper gravel base compaction before the original pour. We address these root causes during site prep to ensure your new slab remains flat and crack-free.

Title: Flooring Installation
Content:
Beautiful floors set the foundation for your entire interior design. At Spicola Construction, we specialize in high-end residential and commercial flooring installation in Tampa, delivering precision-aligned, ultra-durable surfaces that elevate your space. From waterproof luxury vinyl plank (LVP) and classic hardwood to custom tile, marble, and durable commercial epoxy, our experienced flooring craftsmen manage every detail—including subfloor leveling and transitions.

Why Tampa Properties Need Professional Flooring Installation

Tampa's high indoor humidity and concrete slab construction make moisture mitigation critical when installing floors. Without a premium vapor barrier and slab moisture testing, hardwood floors will buckle, LVP seams will separate, and tile grout will crack. We treat every concrete subfloor with professional-grade moisture sealers before installation.

Common Concerns & Warning Signs

  • Buckled, warped, or squeaking floorboards showing high moisture intrusion.
  • Cracked, loose floor tiles or crumbling grout indicating subfloor shifting or poor adhesive bond.
  • Worn, scratched, or heavily stained commercial carpet and laminate needing modernization.
  • Bouncy or uneven flooring showing structural subfloor damage or lack of leveling.

Our Flooring Installation Solutions in Tampa Bay

We install premium flooring materials engineered to resist wear and moisture. Our flooring solutions include:

  • Luxury Vinyl Plank (LVP): Installing 100% waterproof LVP with thick wear layers, ideal for active Florida households and commercial spaces.
  • Hardwood & Engineered Wood: Installing beautiful, classic solid hardwood or stable engineered wood flooring with advanced vapor barriers.
  • Custom Tile & Stone: Laying large-format porcelain tile, natural marble, and intricate patterns with perfect leveling spacers.

How Flooring Installation Protects & Enhances Your Property

Installing new flooring over a damp or water-damaged subfloor leads to severe mold growth and wood rot. During demolition, if we discover subfloor rot or active slab leaks, our sister company **RestoWrx** performs immediate water extraction and structural dryout. We also coordinate with **Hot Water Heroes Plumbing** to ensure all under-floor plumbing lines, toilet wax rings, and appliance water connections are completely leak-free before laying new floors.

Flooring Installation Cost Expectations in Tampa

Flooring installation costs in Tampa vary by material and prep requirements. LVP and laminate installation typically range from $6 to $12 per square foot installed. Tile and hardwood installations range from $10 to $22+ per square foot. We provide all-inclusive, upfront quotes that cover subfloor prep, transitions, baseboards, and shoe molding.

Our Systematic Construction Process

  1. Step 1: Prep & Slab Testing: We remove old flooring, grind down high spots, fill low spots with self-leveling underlayment, and conduct slab moisture tests.
  2. Step 2: Premium Vapor Barrier: We apply high-performance vapor barrier underlayment or roll-on epoxy sealers to block concrete slab moisture.
  3. Step 3: Precision Layout & Install: Our master craftsmen lay your chosen flooring using laser lines, staggered seams, and proper expansion gaps at all walls.
  4. Step 4: Baseboards & Final Walkthrough: We install custom baseboards, matching transition strips, and perform a complete cleanup and inspection.

Schedule Your Free Flooring Installation Consultation

Ready to transform your home or office with stunning, durable new floors? Spicola Construction installs flooring across Hillsborough, Pinellas, and Pasco counties. Contact our flooring estimators at **(813) 732-6285** to schedule a free estimate.

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What flooring material is best for Tampa homes?
A: Luxury Vinyl Plank (LVP) is highly recommended for Florida homes. It is 100% waterproof, highly scratch-resistant, does not expand or contract with humidity, and beautifully mimics the look of real hardwood at a lower cost.

Q: Do you level the subfloor before installing new flooring?
A: Yes. Subfloor preparation is the most critical step. We grind down concrete high spots and apply self-leveling cement to low spots, ensuring your subfloor is perfectly flat within 3/16-inch to prevent future flooring movement or separation.

Q: Can you install hardwood flooring directly onto a concrete slab?
A: Yes, but it requires engineered hardwood and a premium multi-layer vapor barrier or specialized roll-on moisture adhesive. For solid hardwood, we must install a plywood subfloor base over a moisture barrier first.

Q: What is the difference between a cold shell and a warm shell office space?
A: A cold shell has bare concrete floors, unfinished exterior walls, and no HVAC, electrical, or plumbing plumbing. A warm shell has finished concrete, drywalled perimeter walls, lighting, and an operational HVAC system. Warm shell build-outs are typically faster and less expensive to complete.

Q: How long does a commercial office build-out take?
A: A standard 3,000 to 5,000 square foot office build-out typically takes between 6 to 10 weeks of active construction, depending on material lead times and permitting speed. We provide strict weekly milestones to ensure you hit your move-in date.

Title: Medical Office Construction

At Spicola Construction, we specialize in high-performance medical office construction in Tampa, building clinics, dental offices, and wellness centers that are both safe and welcoming.

Why Tampa Properties Need Professional Medical Office Construction

How Medical Office Construction Protects & Enhances Your Property

A single sanitary or structural failure in a medical facility can compromise patient safety and lead to immediate operations shutdowns. We build healthcare facilities using clinical-grade, moisture-resistant drywall and antimicrobial flooring. If a burst pipe or moisture breakout occurs, our sister company **RestoWrx** provides instant emergency dryout, HEPA air filtration, and sterile mold containment. Title: Interior Demolition Services
Content:
Every successful renovation starts with a clean slate. At Spicola Construction, we specialize in safe, precise, and highly controlled interior demolition services in Tampa for residential and commercial renovations. Whether you are stripping a retail space down to its bare concrete shell, tearing down load-bearing walls to open up a home's floorplan, or executing a selective bathroom gut, our experienced demolition crews handle the removal of drywall, concrete, and utilities with minimal disruption to the surrounding structure.

Why Tampa Properties Need Professional Interior Demolition Services

Executing interior demolition in Tampa requires strict dust containment and environmental safety procedures. Older homes and commercial buildings frequently contain hidden asbestos or lead paint that must be safely isolated. Furthermore, in Tampa's humid climate, tearing down walls often exposes hidden active mold colonies, which must be immediately contained and remediated.

Common Concerns & Warning Signs

  • Stripping a leased commercial retail or office space down to a clean concrete shell before a new build-out.
  • Tearing down interior partition walls to create modern open-concept residential layouts.
  • Gutting damaged, outdated kitchens or bathrooms before high-end remodeling.
  • Selective structural removal requiring temporary load-bearing shoring and support beams.

Our Interior Demolition Services Solutions in Tampa Bay

We provide selective and total interior demolition services executed with clinical precision. Our solutions include:

  • Selective Residential Gutting: Cleanly stripping kitchens, bathrooms, or entire rooms down to bare framing studs with active dust barriers.
  • Commercial White-Box Demolition: Stripping leased commercial tenant spaces down to their original concrete floors and bare perimeter walls.
  • Structural Wall & Concrete Removal: Tearing down partition walls, excavating indoor concrete slabs, and installing load-bearing temporary shoring.

How Interior Demolition Services Protects & Enhances Your Property

Demolition can easily compromise structural elements or cut active utility lines if executed without professional planning. We perform extensive site scanning to map plumbing and electrical lines before tearing down any wall. If a hidden active pipe leak or severe mold colony is uncovered during demolition, our sister company **RestoWrx** is on call for instant water mitigation, containment, and HEPA air scrubbing. We also partner with **Hot Water Heroes Plumbing** to safely cap, reroute, and seal old in-wall plumbing lines.

Interior Demolition Services Cost Expectations in Tampa

Interior demolition costs in Tampa typically range from $3 to $10 per square foot depending on accessibility, material composition (concrete vs. drywall), and selective sorting requirements. We offer transparent, upfront pricing proposals that include all labor, structural shoring, heavy-duty dust containment, and complete disposal fees.

Our Systematic Construction Process

  1. Step 1: Utility Isolation & Safety Prep: We scan walls, locate and shut off active water, electrical, and gas lines, and safely cap utilities.
  2. Step 2: Dust Containment & HEPA Filtration: We construct airtight plastic zippered walls and run industrial HEPA negative-air machines to prevent dust from traveling.
  3. Step 3: Precision Demolition & Sorting: Our crews carefully tear down target walls, ceilings, or flooring, sorting and bagging debris responsibly.
  4. Step 4: Clean Haul-off & Final Vacuum: We load and haul off all debris in our trucks, sweep the slab clean, run magnets to collect nails, and vacuum the entire space.

Schedule Your Free Interior Demolition Services Consultation

Need a clean, safe, and professional crew to handle your interior demolition project? Spicola Construction provides selective demolition across Hillsborough, Pinellas, and Pasco counties. Contact our demolition estimators at **(813) 732-6285** to schedule a free site consultation.

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is selective demolition vs. total demolition?
A: Selective demolition involves removing only targeted elements (such as a single bathroom wall or kitchen cabinetry) while protecting the surrounding structure and finishes. Total demolition involves stripping the entire interior of a space down to bare concrete and framing.

Q: How do you control dust from spreading to other rooms?
A: We construct airtight zippered plastic barriers at all exit points, seal off HVAC vents, and run industrial HEPA negative-air machines that constantly filter the indoor air, ensuring dust remains isolated inside the demolition zone.

Q: Do you pull permits for interior demolition in Tampa?
A: Yes. If the project involves structural modifications, wall removals, or major utility changes, local building codes require a selective demolition permit, which we secure for you as part of our full-service process.

Title: Exterior Painting & Stucco
Content:
Your building’s exterior is its first line of defense against Florida’s punishing elements. At Spicola Construction, we specialize in premium exterior painting and professional stucco repair in Tampa, delivering stunning curb appeal and long-lasting structural protection. As a licensed general contractor, we don't just spray paint over cracks—we perform meticulous stucco prep, seal hairline structural cracks, apply premium waterproof elastomeric coatings, and finish with top-tier weather-resistant paint.

Why Tampa Properties Need Professional Exterior Painting & Stucco

Tampa's intense UV rays, high humidity, and heavy summer rainfall present severe challenges for building exteriors. Trapped moisture behind stucco leads to rot, bubbling paint, and structural wood decay. Furthermore, structural shifts on sandy Florida soils cause stucco hairline cracking. We use advanced elastomeric sealers that flex with building movement to prevent future water intrusion.

Common Concerns & Warning Signs

  • Faded, chalking paint showing severe UV binder breakdown.
  • Hairline cracks or visible crumbling in your stucco exterior.
  • Peeling or bubbling paint indicating trapped moisture beneath the surface.
  • Rust stains or mold spots bleeding through your exterior stucco walls.

Our Exterior Painting & Stucco Solutions in Tampa Bay

We restore and coat exteriors to withstand torrential rains and intense heat. Our solutions include:

  • Stucco Repair & Patching: Repairing cracked stucco, matching original textures, and securing loose exterior stucco layers.
  • Waterproof Elastomeric Coatings: Applying heavy-duty elastomeric paints that bridge hairline cracks and form a complete waterproof barrier.
  • Premium Trim & Facade Painting: Painting soffits, fascia, doors, shutters, and masonry accents with ultimate-durability exterior paints.

How Exterior Painting & Stucco Protects & Enhances Your Property

Unsealed stucco cracks allow driving rain to penetrate your framing, causing rotting studs and structural mold. To protect your property, we perform thorough moisture inspections. If severe water damage has already breached your walls, our sister company **RestoWrx** handles immediate structural drying, mold remediation, and internal drywall repair. We also coordinate with **Hot Water Heroes Plumbing** to ensure exterior hose bibs, spigots, and wall penetrations are perfectly sealed and leak-free.

Exterior Painting & Stucco Cost Expectations in Tampa

Exterior stucco repair and painting costs in Tampa typically range from $3,500 to $8,500+ depending on building size, stucco damage, and paint grades. We provide transparent, upfront proposals that include all pressure washing, extensive stucco patching, premium primers, and two full coats of elastomeric paint.

Our Systematic Construction Process

  1. Step 1: Deep Pressure Washing & Algae Removal: We clean the exterior using commercial-grade pressure washing to remove dirt, chalky paint, and mold.
  2. Step 2: Meticulous Stucco Repair: We cut out damaged stucco, patch cracks using fiber-reinforced cement, and match your home's existing texture.
  3. Step 3: Waterproof Priming & Sealing: We apply high-bonding primers to seal the stucco and apply commercial caulking around all doors, windows, and spigots.
  4. Step 4: Premium Painting: We apply two full coats of premium, weather-resistant elastomeric paint, ensuring a thick, flexible, and waterproof finish.

Schedule Your Free Exterior Painting & Stucco Consultation

Ready to protect your home or commercial building with a beautiful, waterproof stucco paint job? Spicola Construction paints and repairs stucco across Hillsborough, Pinellas, and Pasco counties. Contact our exterior estimating team at **(813) 732-6285** to schedule a free estimate.

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is elastomeric paint, and why is it recommended for Tampa stucco?
A: Elastomeric paint is a thick, highly flexible coating that can stretch up to 300% to bridge hairline cracks in stucco. It forms a complete waterproof barrier that prevents rain from penetrating, while allowing interior vapor to escape, making it ideal for Florida's climate.

Q: How do you repair cracked stucco before painting?
A: We grind out loose stucco, clean the crack, apply a premium bonding agent, patch the void with fiber-reinforced stucco mix, and meticulously match the texture of your surrounding wall (such as knockdown, skip trowel, or swirl).

Q: How long will a high-quality exterior paint job last in Florida?
A: A premium paint job utilizing high-quality elastomeric coatings and Sherwin-Williams or Benjamin Moore paints typically lasts between 7 to 10 years in Florida, outlasting standard latex paints by several years.

Title: Fence Installation
Content:
A high-quality fence adds security, privacy, and curb appeal to your property. At Spicola Construction, we specialize in premium residential and commercial fence installation in Tampa, building sturdy barriers that are engineered to last. Whether you want to secure your backyard with a classic white vinyl privacy fence, enclose your commercial property with high-durability chain link, or install a custom horizontal wood fence, we handle the layout, post setting, and gate alignment with expert precision.

Why Tampa Properties Need Professional Fence Installation

Fences in Tampa Bay face extreme sun exposure that warps wood, torrential downpours that cause post footings to sag in sandy soils, and high wind loads. When installing a fence, we dig deep post holes (typically 24 to 36 inches deep depending on wind load requirements) and encase every post in structural concrete to prevent tilting.

Common Concerns & Warning Signs

  • Rotting, sagging, or tilting wood fence posts indicating moisture damage and structural failure.
  • Vinyl or wood panels that have cracked or warped under intense Florida sunlight.
  • Pool safety fence requirements to meet strict Florida building codes and zoning laws.
  • Commercial properties needing secure boundary fencing and heavy-duty double gates.

Our Fence Installation Solutions in Tampa Bay

We install premium fences utilizing heavy-duty post systems and durable materials. Our solutions include:

  • Vinyl & PVC Privacy Fencing: Installing low-maintenance, 100% waterproof vinyl fences that resist UV rays and termites.
  • Custom Wood & Horizontal Fencing: Crafting classic pressure-treated pine or cedar privacy fences, including modern horizontal designs.
  • Commercial Chain Link & Aluminum: Installing high-security chain link with privacy slats, or decorative ornamental aluminum pool fencing.

How Fence Installation Protects & Enhances Your Property

Poorly anchored fence posts can easily blow over during a tropical storm, damaging your property and creating safety hazards. We anchor every post in high-strength concrete and secure panels with rust-resistant hardware. Before digging, we perform thorough site scanning to locate underground utilities. If a severe storm blows down your fence and damages your home's siding or roof, our sister company **RestoWrx** is on call for immediate structural dryout and repairs. We also coordinate with **Hot Water Heroes Plumbing** to ensure fence posts are placed safely away from underground water and sewer lines.

Fence Installation Cost Expectations in Tampa

Fence installation costs in Tampa typically range from $18 to $35+ per linear foot depending on materials (vinyl vs. wood vs. aluminum), height, and excavation requirements. Standard residential vinyl privacy fences typically average $25 to $35 per linear foot. We provide flat-rate, upfront quotes that include all posts, concrete footings, panels, gates, and post-hole excavation.

Our Systematic Construction Process

  1. Step 1: Utility Locates & Layout Design: We coordinate with 811 to locate underground utilities, mark property lines, and design the exact gate and post layout.
  2. Step 2: Digging Post Holes & Setting Concrete: We excavate post holes to code-compliant depths, drop in post sleeves, and encase each post in high-strength concrete.
  3. Step 3: Panel Assembly & Bracing: We install the fence rails, assemble panels, and brace the system to ensure a perfectly straight, level fence line.
  4. Step 4: Custom Gate & Hardware Install: We build and mount custom gates, install heavy-duty latches, and perform a final quality and cleanup inspection.

Schedule Your Free Fence Installation Consultation

Need a secure, beautiful new fence built to withstand Florida's storms? Spicola Construction installs premium fences across Hillsborough, Pinellas, and Pasco counties. Contact our fence estimators today at **(813) 732-6285** to schedule a free estimate.

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is the standard depth for fence posts in Tampa?
A: We dig and set fence posts at a standard depth of 24 to 30 inches, and up to 36 inches for heavy double gates or high-wind zones, encasing the posts in high-strength concrete to prevent shifting in Florida's sandy soil.

Q: Do vinyl fences mold or warp in the Tampa heat?
A: Premium vinyl fencing contains specialized UV inhibitors that prevent warping and fading. While surface algae can develop in high-humidity areas, it does not penetrate the vinyl and can be easily washed away with a quick pressure rinse.

Q: Does Florida law require a fence around residential pools?
A: Yes. The Florida Residential Swimming Pool Safety Act requires a continuous barrier or fence at least 4 feet high around all residential pools, featuring self-closing and self-latching gates that open outward away from the pool.

Title: Deck & Patio Construction

Q: What is the lifespan of a composite deck in Tampa?

A: Yes. Local building codes require a residential building permit for any deck that is attached to a house, higher than 30 inches off the ground, or larger than a specific square footage. We handle the entire permitting process for you.

Q: How do you prevent a wood deck from rotting in Florida's humidity?
A: We use premium pressure-treated lumber for all framing, apply joist tape to protect the tops of joists from water intrusion, maintain proper gaps between deck boards for airflow, and apply advanced water-repellent sealers to natural wood decks.

Content:

At Spicola Construction, we offer professional permit pulling and management services in Tampa, helping homeowners, business owners, and commercial tenants secure building permits quickly and without hassle. As a licensed Certified General Contractor (CGC), we speak the language of building inspectors, manage complex plan reviews, and ensure your project complies with all local building codes and zoning laws.

  • Needing to coordinate structural, electrical, and commercial plumbing permits simultaneously.

Our Permit Pulling & Management Solutions in Tampa Bay

  • Commercial & TI Permitting: Securing commercial building, electrical, mechanical, and plumbing permits for office and retail build-outs.
  • Code Violation Resolution: Resolving active stop-work orders, permitting historical unpermitted work, and passing code inspections.

This fee does not include direct municipal permit filing costs. We provide transparent, flat-rate pricing proposals for all administrative, design coordination, and filing services.

Schedule Your Free Permit Pulling & Management Consultation

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What happens if I get a 'Work Without Permit' citation in Tampa?
A: If you receive a citation, you must immediately halt all construction and apply for a retroactive permit. This requires submitting professional blueprints, scheduling special inspections, and paying double permit fees. We specialize in resolving these violations for you.

Q: How long does it take to get a building permit in Hillsborough County?
A: Residential remodeling permits typically take 3 to 6 weeks, while complex structural additions or new custom home builds can take 6 to 12 weeks to clear county plan reviews. We work to speed up this timeline through clean submittals.

Q: Can a homeowner pull their own building permit in Florida?
A: Yes, under the Florida Owner-Builder exemption, you can pull your own permit if you own and occupy the property. However, you assume all financial and safety liability for the subcontractors and the quality of work. Hiring a licensed general contractor protects you from these risks.

Title: Pre-Construction Consulting

Q: Why do I need a feasibility study before building?

Title: Storm Damage Repair
Content:

At Spicola Construction, we specialize in high-quality storm damage repair in Tampa, helping homeowners and business owners rebuild and restore their properties quickly and safely. As a licensed general contractor, we manage the entire emergency recovery process—including temporary structural stabilization, roof tarping, debris clean-up, and full structural rebuilds.

Why Tampa Properties Need Professional Storm Damage Repair

Tampa properties are highly vulnerable to storm-related hazards, including high-wind roof damage, water intrusion from driving rains, and structural flooding. Restoring storm-damaged buildings requires complying with modern, wind-resistant Florida building codes and executing immediate dryout protocols to prevent severe mold growth.

Common Concerns & Warning Signs

  • Severe roof damage, missing shingles, or structural deck failures after wind events.
  • Water stains on drywall, sagging ceilings, or flooded interiors indicating storm leaks.
  • Fallen trees or flying debris causing structural framing damage to walls, siding, or porches.
  • Needing to coordinate complex structural repairs with homeowner's insurance claims.

Our Storm Damage Repair Solutions in Tampa Bay

We provide rapid-response structural repair solutions to stabilize and rebuild your property. Our solutions include:

  • Emergency Tarping & Board-Up: Quickly sealing compromised roofs and windows to prevent further water damage.
  • Structural Rebuild & Framing: Repairing wind-damaged walls, roof trusses, porches, siding, and stucco to modern safety codes.
  • Insurance Claim Coordination: Providing detailed photographic evidence and line-itemed estimates to support your insurance claim.

How Storm Damage Repair Protects & Enhances Your Property

Water trapped inside walls after a storm will breed toxic mold and rot structural framing within 48 to 72 hours. To protect your home, we provide emergency response. We partner with our sister company **RestoWrx** for immediate high-capacity water extraction, mold remediation, and complete structural dryout. We also coordinate with **Hot Water Heroes Plumbing** to inspect and repair storm-damaged sewer lines, gas lines, spigots, and water heaters.

Storm Damage Repair Cost Expectations in Tampa

Storm damage repair costs in Tampa depend highly on the extent of structural damage. Minor roof tarping and drywall repairs typically range from $1,200 to $4,500. Major structural rebuilds, truss repairs, and complete re-roofs can range from $15,000 to $100,000+. We provide comprehensive, fully itemized quotes that comply with insurance industry estimation standards.

Our Systematic Construction Process

  1. Step 1: Emergency Site Stabilization: We quickly tarp roofs, board up broken windows, and clear hazardous structural debris.
  2. Step 2: Dryout & Mold Prevention: We coordinate with RestoWrx to run industrial dehumidifiers, dry the framing, and apply antimicrobial treatments.
  3. Step 3: Structural Rebuild Planning: We secure required building permits, coordinate engineering calculations, and plan structural repairs.
  4. Step 4: Precision Reconstruction: Our master craftsmen rebuild framing, drywall, roofing, stucco, and finishes, passing all code inspections.

Schedule Your Free Storm Damage Repair Consultation

Has your home or business suffered wind or water damage from a storm? Spicola Construction provides reliable storm damage repair across Hillsborough, Pinellas, and Pasco counties. Contact our emergency response team at **(813) 732-6285** to schedule an immediate inspection.

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Do you assist with the insurance claim process?
A: Yes. We work closely with property owners and adjusters. We provide highly detailed, photographic documentation of the damage, along with comprehensive line-itemed estimates using industry-standard software to support your claim.

Q: How quickly can you tarp a leaking roof after a storm?
A: We dispatch emergency tarping and board-up crews as soon as weather conditions are safe for our technicians to work. We prioritize emergency calls to prevent secondary water damage to your interiors.

Q: Can you repair structural framing damaged by fallen trees?
A: Yes. As a licensed general contractor, we specialize in structural framing. We install temporary shoring, remove the debris, replace damaged roof trusses or load-bearing studs, and tie the new structure back into your existing home.
